"bounds": [18, 540, 411, 606], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "The aim of this taping is to compress the soft tissue under the heel to increase natural cushioning and protect the heel from impact.

This is not suitable for Plantar Fasciitis heel pain which is a different condition were a different taping technique will be effective (see Plantar Fasciitis).", "resource-id": "uk.co.isai.android.app231:id/textViewDetails1", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "58cb95b", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "selected": false, "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [18, 235, 1440, 643], "draw": false, "focusable": false, "long-clickable": false, "visibility": "visible", "focused": false, "clickable": false, "abs-pos": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "visible-to-user": true, "package": "uk.co.isai.android.app231", "enabled": true, "bounds": [18, 606, 1440, 1014], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "Instructions", "resource-id": "uk.co.isai.android.app231:id/textViewTitle2", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "4c6d5f8", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "selected": false, "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [18, 696, 282, 762], "draw": false, "focusable": false, "long-clickable": false, "visibility": "visible", "focused": false, "clickable": false, "abs-pos": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "visible-to-user": true, "package": "uk.co.isai.android.app231", "enabled": true, "bounds": [18, 1067, 282, 1133], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "The technique is best viewed on the video which is linked at the bottom of this page.

What is required?

- One roll of non stretch zinc oxide tape about 1 inch or 2.5cm wide.

How is it done?

- Place an anchor strip horizontally around the back of the heel.
- Then place a support strip under the heel.
- Then repeat the first anchor strip over the top. Continue alternating support strips and anchor strips until most of the heel is covered.

"uk.co.isai.android.app231:id/textViewSummary", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [18, 456, 893, 522], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Purpose of taping", "resource-id": "uk.co.isai.android.app231:id/textViewTitle1", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [18, 540, 411, 606], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "The aim of this taping is to compress the soft tissue under the heel to increase natural cushioning and protect the heel from impact.

This is not suitable for Plantar Fasciitis heel pain which is a different condition were a different taping technique will be effective (see Plantar Fasciitis).", "resource-id": "uk.co.isai.android.app231:id/textViewDetails1", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [18, 606, 1440, 1014], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Instructions", "resource-id": "uk.co.isai.android.app231:id/textViewTitle2", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [18, 1067, 282, 1133], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "The technique is best viewed on the video which is linked at the bottom of this page.

What is required?

- One roll of non stretch zinc oxide tape about 1 inch or 2.5cm wide.

How is it done?

- Place an anchor strip horizontally around the back of the heel.
- Then place a support strip under the heel.
- Then repeat the first anchor strip over the top. Continue alternating support strips and anchor strips until most of the heel is covered.
